Title: Register a new customer account
Preconditions:
- User is on the registration page.
- No existing account with the provided email.
Test Data:
- Name: "John"
- Cognome: "Doe"
- Email: "john.doe@example.com"
- Password: "SecurePass123!"
- Immagine: (optional, default profile image)
- isVenditore: false
Test Steps:
1. Enter name, surname, email, password, and confirm password.
2. Leave the image field empty (optional).
3. Set `isVenditore` to false.
4. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- Account is created successfully.
- User is redirected to the login page with a success message.
- Email is verified (if applicable) or account is active immediately.

Title: Register a new vendor account
Preconditions:
- User is on the registration page.
- No existing account with the provided email.
Test Data:
- Name: "Maria"
- Cognome: "Rossi"
- Email: "maria.rossi@example.com"
- Password: "VendorPass456!"
- Immagine: (optional, default profile image)
- isVenditore: true
- nomeNegozio: "Rossi Store"
- indirizzo: "Via Roma 123, Milano"
- indirizzoVenditore: "Via Roma 123, Milano"
Test Steps:
1. Enter name, surname, email, password, and confirm password.
2. Set `isVenditore` to true.
3. Fill in `nomeNegozio`, `indirizzo`, and `indirizzoVenditore`.
4. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- Vendor account is created successfully.
- User is redirected to the vendor dashboard with a success message.
- Vendor details (store name, address) are saved.

Title: Register with invalid email format
Preconditions: - User is on the registration page.
Test Data:
- Name: "Jane"
- Cognome: "Smith"
- Email: "invalid.email" (missing @ and domain)
- Password: "Pass123!"
Test Steps:
1. Enter name, surname, invalid email, and password.
2. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Invalid email format."
- Account is not created.

Title: Register with existing email
Preconditions: - An account with email "test.user@example.com" already exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter name, surname, duplicate email, and password.
2. Click "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Email already registered."
- Account is not created.

Title: Create a valid product review
Preconditions:
- User is logged in as a customer.
- A product exists in the system.
Test Data:
- Titolo: "Great Product!"
- Descrizione: "Works as expected, fast delivery."
- Voto: 5
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Click "Leave a Review" button.
3. Enter title, description, and select a rating (5 stars).
4. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result:
- Review is created and associated with the product.
- User sees a confirmation message: "Review submitted successfully."
- Review appears in the product's review section.

Title: Create a review with empty description
Preconditions: - User is logged in as a customer.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Click "Leave a Review" button.
3. Enter title, leave description empty, and select a rating.
4. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Description is required."
- Review is not submitted.

Title: Create a review with invalid rating
Preconditions: - User is logged in as a customer.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Click "Leave a Review" button.
3. Enter title and description, then select an invalid rating (0 or 6).
4. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Rating must be between 1 and 5."
- Review is not submitted.

Title: Create a valid product report
Preconditions: - User is logged in as a customer.
Test Data:
- Titolo: "Incorrect Product Description"
- Descrizione: "The product image does not match the description."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Click "Report Issue" button.
3. Enter title and description.
4. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result:
- Report is created and sent for review.
- User sees a confirmation message: "Report submitted successfully."
- Report appears in the vendor's pending reports section.

Title: Create a report with empty title
Preconditions: - User is logged in as a customer.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product page.
2. Click "Report Issue" button.
3. Leave title empty and enter description.
4. Click "Submit" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Title is required."
- Report is not submitted.

Title: Add a customer as a preferred vendor
Preconditions:
- Vendor is logged in.
- A customer exists in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Preferred Customers" section.
2. Search for and select "John Doe."
3. Assign a rating of 5.
4. Click "Save" button.
Expected Result:
- Customer is added to the vendor's preferred list.
- Vendor sees a confirmation message: "Customer added to preferred list."
- Preferred customer record is created with the assigned rating.

Title: Add a customer with invalid rating
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Preferred Customers" section.
2. Search for and select "Jane Smith."
3. Assign an invalid rating (0 or 6).
4. Click "Save" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Rating must be between 1 and 5."
- Customer is not added to the preferred list.

Title: Modify a product with valid inputs
Preconditions:
- Vendor is logged in.
- A product exists (e.g., "Laptop X1").
Test Data:
- nome: "Laptop X1 Pro"
- categoria: "Electronics"
- prezzo: 999.99
- descrizione: "Updated description: High-performance laptop with 16GB RAM."
Test Steps:
1. Click on the product "Laptop X1."
2. Click the "Modifica" (Edit) button.
3. Update all fields with valid data.
4. Click "Applica modifiche" (Apply Changes).
Expected Result:
- Product details are updated successfully.
- Vendor sees a confirmation message: "Product updated successfully."
- Changes are reflected in the product listing.

Title: Modify a product with empty description
Preconditions:
- Vendor is logged in.
- A product exists.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the product.
2. Click the "Modifica" button.
3. Leave the description field empty.
4. Click "Applica modifiche."
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Description is required."
- Product is not updated.

Title: Modify a product with negative price
Preconditions:
- Vendor is logged in.
- A product exists.
Test Data:
- nome: "Laptop X1"
- categoria: "Electronics"
- prezzo: -100.00 (invalid)
- descrizione: "High-performance laptop."
Test Steps:
1. Click on the product.
2. Click the "Modifica" button.
3. Set price to -100.00.
4. Click "Applica modifiche."
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Price must be greater than 0."
- Product is not updated.

Title: Add a new product with valid inputs
Test Data:
- nome: "Wireless Headphones"
- categoria: "Electronics"
- prezzo: 79.99
- descrizione: "Noise-cancelling wireless headphones."
Test Steps:
1. Click the "+" (Add Product) button.
2. Fill in all fields with valid data.
3. Click "Aggiungi!" (Add).
Expected Result:
- Product is added successfully.
- Vendor sees a confirmation message: "Product added successfully."
- New product appears in the vendor's product list.

Title: Add a product with empty name
Test Steps:
1. Click the "+" button.
2. Leave the name field empty.
3. Fill in other fields.
4. Click "Aggiungi!"
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Product name is required."
- Product is not added.

Title: Add a product with zero price
Test Data:
- nome: "Free Sample"
- categoria: "Sample"
- prezzo: 0.00
- descrizione: "Free product sample."
Test Steps:
1. Click the "+" button.
2. Fill in all fields, setting price to 0.00.
3. Click "Aggiungi!"
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Price must be greater than 0."
- Product is not added.
